title: Vanilla reality
description: A vanilla "+" Experience for Minecraft java
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3c9f3e41b9026b539be2e26a3c4d563ee2159d.png)

<details>
<summary>About</summary>

Vanilla reality is a vanilla+ modpack that enhaces the normal minecraft experience adding resource packs,sounds,graphics,animations,etc. One o the bests things are the performace,you can play this with a toaster!
This modpack makes the game a little better adding shaders,optimization,textures,sounds,animations,camera movements and some little things like now there are heads in the chat!
If you want to play minecraft, you can play with this modpack!


</details>


![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3c9f3e41b9026b539be2e26a3c4d563ee2159d.png)


<details>
<summary>WARNINGS</summary>

There are some mods that might cause motion sickness.
Its recomended to disable "Camera overhaul" and "Do a barrel roll".There may be some bugs to fix.


</details>


![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3c9f3e41b9026b539be2e26a3c4d563ee2159d.png)

<details>
<summary>Performace</summary>

You can play with a toaster but just if you get the correct settings. If you dont have a good performace computer, its most likely to disable particles and shaders

</details>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3c9f3e41b9026b539be2e26a3c4d563ee2159d.png)

# Milestones
### **12/24/25**, 100 downloads, Merry chrstmas!!
